item.title: Activities
item.description: We’ve put together a collection of our favourite spots in the area, and we’d love to know what yours are! Get in touch and let us know what we’re missing!

item.title: Gallery
item.description: Here are some impressions of the house

item.title: About
item.description: Two-storey house, fully furnished, fully equipped. Ideal for couples and families up to 5 persons. Located in “Agios Ilias” village near the town of Pyrgos, in Ilia, Peloponnese. You can check the availability of the house on the AirBnb website. You can also contact us directly. Location 92 km from the port of Patras, 9 km from the town of Pyrgos, 30 km from Ancient Olympia. Within a private orangery area, five hundred metres from the beach, next to the 5-star hotel “Aldemar Olympian Village”.

item.title: Prices
item.description: Rates We offer a 33% discount for stays from 28 days and above. Month Price per day Nov - Mar 85 EUR Apr - Mai 100 EUR Jun 119 EUR Jul - Aug 149 EUR Sep 100 EUR Okt 91 EUR

item.title: Contact
item.description: To contact us, please fill out the form below.
